title: Performance Metrics Path
description: Build fluency in Performance Metrics inside Model Evaluation by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Loss Value
steps.summary: Loss Value belongs to the Model Evaluation area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Model Evaluation / Performance Metrics. Start after Loss and Q-Value.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Model Drift
steps.summary: Model Drift belongs to the Model Evaluation area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Model Evaluation / Performance Metrics. Compare it with Model Evaluation and Generalization. It opens into MMD drift and Data Drift.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Generalization
steps.summary: Generalization belongs to the Model Evaluation area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Model Evaluation / Performance Metrics. Compare it with Model Evaluation and Model Drift. It opens into Domain Generalization and Memory Generalization.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Model Evaluation
steps.summary: Model Evaluation belongs to the Model Evaluation area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Model Evaluation / Performance Metrics. Compare it with Model Drift and Generalization. It opens into bias evaluation and self evaluation.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Model Performance Degradation
steps.summary: Model Performance Degradation belongs to the Model Evaluation area of AI/ML, within Performance Metrics. It sits inside Model Evaluation / Performance Metrics. Compare it with Loss Value and Model Evaluation.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
